description: Real trainable-parameter counts per PEFT method, counted directly from the saved adapter weights (adapter_model.safetensors contains exactly the trainable parameters). Base model not required: parameter count = sum of numel across all tensors in the adapter safetensors header.
counting_method: sum of shape products across all tensors in models/<method>/adapter_model.safetensors

dora.adapter_config: models/dora/adapter_config.json (LoRA r=16 + DoRA magnitude vectors, 7 target modules)
dora.note: DoRA adds one magnitude vector per target module (196 extra tensors, ~774,144 params over QLoRA)
